NAVAREA XIX 26/23
 NORWEGIAN SEA

 ANDOYA SPACE WILL CONDUCT LAUNCH OPERATIONS DAILY IN PERIOND 2045 TO 0400 UTC FROM 17 TO 26 MAR 
 MARITIME TRAFFIC IS REQUESTED TO BE AWARE OF AND AVOID FOLLOWING HAZARD AREAS :

 DANGER AREA VORTEX INNER
 69-23.00N 016-03.50E
 69-18.20N 016-05.40E
 69-17.00N 015-59.40E
 69-19.30N 015-48.20E
 69-23.90N 015-50.40E

 DANGER AREA VORTEX OUTER 
 72-04.05N 014-25.35E
 71-48.45N 015-05.40E
 71-01.80N 015-36.45E
 70-03.60N 015-28.50E
 69-49.95N 014-35.10E
 70-23.85N 010-29.10E
 71-20.70N 009-37.50E
 71-41.70N 009-43.65E
 71-57.45N 010-40.65E
 72-09.90N 013-21.00E

 FOR STATUS UPDATES OR NEED FOR TRANSIT INSIDE THE AREAS VESSELS ARE REQUESTED TO CONTACT ANDOYA SPACE ON VHF CH 14 OR 16.
 IF OUTSIDE VHF RANGE OF LAUNCH SITE USE PHONE NO +47 7614 4426
 ANDOYA SPACE RANGE CONTROL WILL BE MANNED 3 HOURS PRIOR TO START OF ACTIVITIES
 FOR DAILY UPDATES AND MAPS SEE WWW.ANDOYASPACE.NO AND WWW.BARENTSWACH.NO FISKEINFO.
  
 2.CANCEL NAVAREA XIX 21/23
